hook.text: If you suspect you have endometriosis here is what should you know
hook.emotional_mechanism_raw: Addresses frustration and urgency of getting a diagnosis
hook.target_audience_raw: People who suspect they have endometriosis and are struggling to get a diagnosis

main_claim.text: The best thing you can do to get a diagnosis is map out your symptoms: what is cyclical, what is not, and note impacts like missing work or passing out.

supporting_explanation.summary: Details how to identify cyclical vs non-cyclical symptoms and their severity to present clearly to a specialist.

funnel_rationale: Focuses on preparing for diagnosis and specialist consultation, not just awareness.

cta.wording: If you need help figuring out who to see privately or book a session with Liz - link in bio.
cta.requested_action_raw: Click link in bio to book a session or find a private specialist
cta.value_exchange_raw: Help navigating private specialist access or booking a session with Liz

speaker.primary_raw: Liz (likely clinic specialist or patient advocate)

format_raw: TikTok video with onscreen text and spoken advice
